page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Conterminator: software to detect contamination in large sequence sets
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Conterminator: software to detect contamination in large sequence sets
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Conterminator is an efficient method to detect incorrectly labeled sequences across kingdoms by an exhaustive all-against-all sequence comparison. It is free open-source GPLv3-licensed software for Linux and macOS.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Conterminator is an efficient method to detect incorrectly labeled sequences across kingdoms by an exhaustive all-against-all sequence comparison. It is free open-source GPLv3-licensed software for Linux and macOS.
